description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single build stage and a pages job. Use debian:sid for the build_on_debian-sid job, running before_script commands to update apt, install software-properties-common and gpg, add the eclufsc/ophidian PPA key and repository, and install $DEPENDENCIES_UBUNTU_ARTFUL $DEPENDENCIES_GUI; then script: mkdir build && cd build, cmake -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=/usr -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DOPHIDIAN_GUI=ON .., make -j2, cd test, ./ophidian_tests, and publish the build/ directory as an artifact. Define analogous build_on_ubuntu-artful (ubuntu:artful) and build_on_ubuntu-bionic (ubuntu:bionic) jobs with their respective apt‑get update, add‑apt‑repository, and dependency install steps, followed by the same cmake/make/test script and build/ artifact. Add build_using_dependencies_script_on_sistem (ubuntu:artful) that installs $BUILD_SCRIPT_DEPENDENCIES $DEPENDENCIES_GUI, runs "echo y | bash build_dependencies.sh --install_to /usr/local" before the standard build steps, and build_using_dependencies_script_on_source (ubuntu:artful) that runs "echo \"y\" | bash build_dependencies.sh" before the same build steps; both also archive build/. Finally, add a pages job that runs on the master branch using the alpine image, installs doxygen via apk, generates documentation with doxygen Doxyfile, moves the generated HTML to a public/ folder, and publishes public/ as the pages artifact.
